loan_payment_date.text: วันที่ชำระล่าสุด

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( order by tab.member_group_no , tab.membership_no , tab.loan_contract_no ) as rowno, tab.* from (SELECT decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract_thai , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as last_access_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as last_calcint_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_process_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as last_process_tdate
, (select telephone from sc_mem_m_member_address where address_type = '0' and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as telephone
, (select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( max(loan_payment_date) , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and item_type_code not in ('PM','RM') ) as loan_payment_tdate
FROM sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and (select max(loan_payment_date) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and item_type_code not in ('PM','RM') ) between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_2!' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date between '01/10/2023' and '01/07/2024' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '00002' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) tab
